forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,23 @@
+---
+depends_on:
+- 01KWMECNX02RYW074R5DFHQ4EA
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: 8a80
+title: 'Examples: CatalogSearch and SemanticSearch executables'
+---
+## What
+Build the first two `Examples/` executable targets per plan.md ┬¦13 (M8), added to `Package.swift` as executable targets depending on the library (demos only ŌĆö the library never depends on them):
+- `Examples/CatalogSearch/main.swift` ŌĆö the ~30-line hello world: a handful of fixture items conforming to `SearchableMetadata`, keyword-only `MetadataSearcher(mode: .retrieval)` (no embedder, no model), one query, printed `Match`es with per-signal `Signals`. Runs anywhere, GPU-free.
+- `Examples/SemanticSearch/main.swift` ŌĆö CatalogSearch plus `RoutedEmbedderAdapter`: a paraphrased query ("save my work" ŌåÆ `commit`) ranks where keywords miss; `--no-embedder` flag demonstrates keyword-only degradation and prints its diagnostic.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+- [ ] `swift run CatalogSearch` prints ranked matches with signals, exit 0, no model downloads
+- [ ] `swift run SemanticSearch --no-embedder` prints the degradation diagnostic and keyword-only results, exit 0, GPU-free
+- [ ] Both targets compile as part of `swift build` (CI keeps them compiling)
+
+## Tests
+- [ ] `Tests/FoundationModelsMetadataRegistryTests/ExamplesSmokeTests.swift` ŌĆö invoke the example entry logic (factored into a callable function per example) and assert on its output for the GPU-free paths
+- [ ] Run `swift build && swift test` ŌĆö exit 0
+
+## Workflow
+- Use `/tdd` ŌĆö write failing tests first, then implement to make them pass.
\ No newline at end of file
